python3 << 'PYEOF'

import urllib.request,urllib.error
try:
    r=urllib.request.urlopen('https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/crm-dashboard',timeout=45)
    b=r.read(); ishtml=(b[:60].lower().find(b'<!doctype')>=0 or b[:200].lower().find(b'<html')>=0)
    print('ДАШБОРД: HTTP',r.status,'| байт',len(b),'| HTML:',ishtml)
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    print('ДАШБОРД HTTP',e.code,'| body:',e.read()[:150].decode('utf-8','ignore'))
except Exception as e:
    print('ERR',e)

PYEOF
